roles.responsibility: Normalize the goal, inspect constraints, and produce the active run plan.
Select registry-backed capabilities and policy hints.
Create deterministic code and execute it in a bounded sandbox.
Compile the brief into text, scene, and media plans.
Generate or mock a reference image.
Generate or mock a video artifact.
Compose a typed canvas graph with provenance.
Judge trace, artifact, policy, and topology completeness.
Export the final report and termination evidence.

tasks.label: Inspect goal, input brief, and tool capabilities
Select registry-backed capabilities and policy hints
Research the input brief and produce an evidence pack
Create and execute bounded sandbox code
Generate text plan and media prompts
Verify artifacts, trace, canvas, and policy posture

agents.title: Investment Research Agent
agents.summary: Source-grounded investment research with claims, evidence, contradictions, assumptions, and review-first graph candidates.
agents.fallback: Return a source-gap report and verification plan without fabricating claims, citations, prices, or provenance.
vccs: Every material claim is linked to evidence or marked as an assumption.
No graph mutation or paid model call occurs without the required approval.
promptContract: Separate claims, evidence, assumptions, contradictions, open questions, and verification steps.
Stage graph candidates for review before mutation.
State evidence freshness and research-depth cost posture.

agents.title: PMF Agent
agents.summary: Evidence-led product-market-fit hypotheses, problem-to-solution gap mapping, and falsifiable experiment planning.
agents.fallback: Return an insufficient-evidence report, ranked unknowns, and a bounded verification plan without inventing customer demand, retention, willingness to pay, or provenance.
vccs: Every material PMF signal is linked to evidence or marked as an assumption.
Problem, solution, adoption, retention, and willingness-to-pay signals remain distinct.
Experiments include decision thresholds and stop conditions; outreach, spend, persistence, and mutation remain approval-gated.
promptContract: Separate target segment, job to be done, pain, alternatives, product promise, adoption, retention, willingness to pay, evidence confidence, freshness, and unknowns.
Map problem-to-solution gaps and rank hypotheses from cited evidence.
Return falsifiable experiments with thresholds and one continue, iterate, pivot, or insufficient-evidence recommendation.

agents.title: SME Care Agent
agents.summary: Coverage-gap and risk-exposure guidance for SMEs across cyber, supply-chain, asset, and growth-stage change.
agents.fallback: Return an explicit unknown-and-evidence-needed assessment with a licensed adviser handoff; never imply that unknown coverage is safe.
vccs: Exposure, coverage, gaps, evidence confidence, and urgency remain distinct.
Recommendations stop before automated quote, bind, or policy mutation.
Every material gap includes evidence needed and a review path.
promptContract: Build a living protection graph across exposures, controls, policies, limits, exclusions, dependencies, evidence, and gaps.
Keep urgency separate from evidence confidence.
Guide the SME to a review-ready adviser handoff rather than automated binding.

agents.title: Video Agent
agents.summary: Source-backed video reasoning across transcript, frame evidence, annotations, timeline planning, render intent, and rich-media output.
agents.fallback: Return source metadata, frame and transcript evidence, a deterministic render plan, and a structured provider-unavailable error without inventing media URLs.
vccs: Every media artifact preserves source and prompt provenance.
Dry-run makes zero paid calls and emits no invented URLs.
Render and publish mutations remain approval-gated.
promptContract: Compile source metadata, transcript windows, frame evidence, annotations, timeline lanes, render intent, and rich-media outputs.
Use operator-supplied media and preserve artifact provenance.
Keep generation providers behind runtime adapters and explicit approvals.
